ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector that the company operates in */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the stock information (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock's unique identifier */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that day */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_trading_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the index is tracked */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the index information */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the index information (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the index's unique identifier */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the index for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the index for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the index for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the index for the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades associated with the index on that day */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index price entry */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the index */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price of the index */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the index price compared to the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_trading_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the session is a holiday */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Status of the market (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades during the session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded during that session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the volume data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price rise, price drop) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is currently active */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
